title: Re: World of Tech
body:
![Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea606fa267f44c6cac7a42a536fcde919da3822_0.webp)
# Explore a world shaped by technological progression!

A remake of an old pack me and my friends used back on 1.19.2 but with extra mods and more fleshed out content! (technically a kitchen sink modpack)

Re: World of Tech aims to be a full tech modpack for Fabric 1.21.1, It has many QoL mods and 2 masive tech mods, Oritech, and Energized Power! Explore massive sprawling landscapes thanks to Techtonic & Terralith, and beautiful seasons thanks to fabric seasons.

Fight Overhauled Vanilla Bosses, and explore Magic and Weaponary. Grow your infrastructure and expand your factory to the max!

Wanna play with friends? e4mc is included for simple multiplayer with friends.

**THIS MODPACK IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT**

**Requires atleast 4GB of Memory allocation (6GB recommended)**

**Alot of mods in this pack are in beta, expect MANY bugs and glitches. If you find anything serious, Please contact mod authors via their respective issue tracker.**

**(also currently broken on dedicated servers, working on a seperate server pack version(coming in 1.4.2))**

## List of externally sourced mods:
- [Travelers Compass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/travelers-compass)(Pre 1.4.2)

- [Ender Dragon Egg Respawn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ender-dragon-egg-respawn-fabric)(Pre 1.4.2)

- [Big Beacons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/big-beacons)(Pre 1.4.2)

- [Mining Dimensions[Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mining-dimensions-fabric)

- [DarkSmelting RPG Smelting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/darksmelting)(Pre 1.4.2)
